Over 50% white: 1/2 target + 1/2 Natural (.N) or Gold (.3) on same level per Majirel chart.
Gray coverage: incorporate Natural (N) series per Kenra workbook chart; up to 40 min.
Colorance demi: Fashion + N-shade mix; Cover Plus NN for higher gray.
FACTION8 100% white-hair coverage guidance: add 1/4 to 1/2 Natural series; use Double Natural (-00) for intense coverage.
FACTION8 High Lift: process 45-55 minutes, use on levels 5+, and do not mix High Lift colors with other target shades.
